unresolved_review_threads.finding: Authority flags validated with not manifest.get(key), allowing missing keys to pass.
unresolved_review_threads.required_fix: Require every authority key to exist and be exactly False.

unresolved_review_threads.finding: Checkpoint cadence rescans/parses every record after each S1 natural generation.
unresolved_review_threads.required_fix: Maintain and update an in-memory completed-key set; scan disk only on startup/recovery.

unresolved_review_threads.finding: Core result court receives evidence-upload status before final assessment upload and therefore blocks every otherwise-successful run.
unresolved_review_threads.required_fix: Separate core scientific verdict from final publication disposition; remove circular final-upload dependency.

unresolved_review_threads.finding: Publisher writes a final assessment receipt but returns the earlier evidence receipt.
unresolved_review_threads.required_fix: Return and persist the final receipt from the final-upload branch.

unresolved_review_threads.finding: Measured records hard-code prefix_equivalence/runtime_reference_agree/unsafe_stop to safe values.
unresolved_review_threads.required_fix: Derive every court predicate independently from immutable raw token, runtime, and reference evidence.
